---
title: Chapter 1
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["--bs-primary:.*#2c3e50"]
        - ["#375a7f"]
---

## Chapter 1

This document should inherit flatly from `chapters/_metadata.yml`,
overriding the project-level darkly theme.
